title: Linting Rule Structure
description: Structural representation of a normalized linting rule that can be sourced from Spectral, Vacuum, Redocly CLI, Optic, sweater-comb, Speakeasy, Postman API Governance, or Apicurio. Companion to linting-rule-schema.json.
name: LintingRule

description.description: Human-readable summary of what the rule enforces.

message.description: Violation message; may contain placeholder tokens like `{{error}}`, `{{path}}`, `{{value}}`.

severity.description: One of error, warn, info, hint, off (or integer 0-3).

given.description: Selector expressions (JSONPath++, Redocly where, Optic FactsContext).

then.description: One or more assertions evaluated against each matched node.

target.description: Artifact region (info, paths, operations, schemas, channels, messages, etc.).

when.description: Optional gating condition keyed to subject/matches/property/value.

formats.description: Format scope (oas3_0, oas3_1, asyncapi2, asyncapi3, arazzo1, ...)

recommended.description: Whether the rule belongs to the `recommended` profile.

sourceTool.description: Originating linter (spectral, vacuum, redocly-cli, optic, sweater-comb, speakeasy, postman, apicurio, apimetrics).

sourceUrl.description: URL pointing at the canonical rule definition.

documentationUrl.description: URL pointing at human documentation for the rule.

field.description: Sub-field of the matched node to apply the function to.

function.description: Function name (truthy, falsy, defined, undefined, pattern, enumeration, length, alphabetical, casing, xor, schema, ...).

functionOptions.description: Function-specific options (e.g. match/notMatch for pattern, type for casing, min/max for length).
